programme.title: Putin - A Russian Spy Story
programme.desc: A portrait of a politician who created his image as the Russian James Bond, and whose rule has something of a spy thriller in it.Vladimir Putin has ruled Russia with an iron fist for 20 years.

programme.title: Secrets of the Spy Whale
programme.desc: In April 2019, a tamed whale approached the boats of Norwegian fishermen wearing a camera-mounting harness marked "Equipment of St. Petersburg".This has sparked speculation that the Arctic beluga may have been trained by the Russian Navy for espionage duties.The creators of the program discover the secrets of the whale.They ask where he came from, who trained him and what he was doing in this part of the Arctic.They also discuss the behind-the-scenes of the secret world of using marine mammals for international espionage and present Hvaldimir's true identity.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Host Chris Harris, cricket legend Freddie Flintoff and comedian Paddy McGuinness face the biggest challenges of their careers and experience the toughest tests while testing cars.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: The competitors' task is to create a chain of correct answers.After each round, one person considered to be the weakest link is eliminated.The pressure increases with every passing minute.Hosted by Romesh Ranganathan.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: The most popular game show in the world, hosted by Jeremy Clarkson.Each participant has 15 questions and the opportunity to win a million pounds.During the game, he can use lifebuoys.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: There is no shortage of brave architects with original visions around the world.To achieve them, they often take great risks, using untested materials or innovative solutions.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and his two friends James and Richard test cars, subjecting them to extreme tasks.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop 3
programme.desc: A team of mechanics from the Smallest Cog workshop restores the former glory of subsequent car models.

programme.title: The Best of Top Gear Series 27, 28
programme.desc: The most interesting moments from the 27th and 28th seasons.Comedy actor Paddy McGuinness, cricket legend Freddie Flintoff and rally driver Chris Harris share a passion for cars.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: The competitors' task is to create a chain of correct answers.After each round, one person considered to be the weakest link is eliminated.The pressure increases with every passing minute.Hosted by Romesh Ranganathan.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: There is no shortage of brave architects with original visions around the world.To achieve them, they often take great risks, using untested materials or innovative solutions.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The fifteenth series of the program for automotive enthusiasts.The presenters test new car models.The program is carried out with the participation of the audience.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and his two friends James and Richard test cars, subjecting them to extreme tasks.

programme.title: The Best of Top Gear Series 27, 28
programme.desc: The most interesting moments from the 27th and 28th seasons.Comedy actor Paddy McGuinness, cricket legend Freddie Flintoff and rally driver Chris Harris share a passion for cars.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop 3
programme.desc: A team of mechanics from the Smallest Cog workshop restores the former glory of subsequent car models.

programme.desc: There is no shortage of brave architects with original visions around the world.To achieve them, they often take great risks, using untested materials or innovative solutions.

Top Gear

programme.desc: There is no shortage of brave architects with original visions around the world.To achieve them, they often take great risks, using untested materials or innovative solutions.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby 4
Narodziny miliarderów
programme.desc: A small group of fabulously wealthy people dominated society.They are wealthier and more influential than many countries.Their genius, dedication to passions, and even antics influence stock markets, the development of cities, the mechanisms of democracy and our way of thinking.Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg, the founders of Google - Larry Page and Sergey Brin - not only earned fortunes, but also shaped reality, changed culture, economic structures and way of life.The beginnings of their stunning careers were not a bed of roses - youthful attempts in basements, garages and dorms only brought luxuries in the form of private jets and yachts years later.Viewers will learn about the breakthrough moments of their professional lives and why they achieved success.The show examines the ups and downs of their companies, as well as the stunning rise of billionaires around the world.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials: BBC Radio 2 Special
programme.desc: Competitors have to create a chain of correct answers.After each round, one person considered by the team to be the weakest link is eliminated.The pressure is growing by the minute.Hosted by Romesh Ranganathan.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Host Chris Harris, cricket legend Freddie Flintoff and comedian Paddy McGuinness face the biggest challenges of their careers and experience the toughest tests while testing cars.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: The competitors' task is to create a chain of correct answers.After each round, one person considered to be the weakest link is eliminated.The pressure increases with every passing minute.Hosted by Romesh Ranganathan.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: The most popular game show in the world, hosted by Jeremy Clarkson.Each participant has 15 questions and the opportunity to win a million pounds.During the game, he can use lifebuoys.

programme.desc: There is no shortage of brave architects with original visions around the world.To achieve them, they often take great risks, using untested materials or innovative solutions.

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and his two friends James and Richard test cars, subjecting them to extreme tasks.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop 3
programme.desc: A team of mechanics from the Smallest Cog workshop restores the former glory of subsequent car models.

programme.title: The Best of Top Gear Series 27, 28
programme.desc: The most interesting moments from the 27th and 28th seasons.Comedy actor Paddy McGuinness, cricket legend Freddie Flintoff and rally driver Chris Harris share a passion for cars.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: The competitors' task is to create a chain of correct answers.After each round, one person considered to be the weakest link is eliminated.The pressure increases with every passing minute.Hosted by Romesh Ranganathan.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May present new car models and automotive issues.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May present new car models and automotive issues.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May present new car models and automotive issues.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May present new car models and automotive topics.Interviews, tests.

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: One of the funniest comedy series.France, the years of World War II.The owner of the café, René Artois, experiences strange adventures among his friends and those tracking the Nazi resistance.

credits.actor: pułkownik Kurt von Strohm - Richard Marner
Madame Fanny La Fan/Leclerc - Rose Hill

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: France, the years of World War II.The owner of a small provincial cafe, René Artois, experiences funny adventures among his family, friends and Nazi officials tracking the resistance movement.

credits.actor: pułkownik Kurt von Strohm - Richard Marner
Madame Fanny La Fan/Leclerc - Rose Hill

programme.title: Narodziny miliarderów
programme.desc: A small group of fabulously wealthy people dominated society.They are wealthier and more influential than many countries.Their genius, dedication to passions, and even antics influence stock markets, the development of cities, the mechanisms of democracy and our way of thinking.Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg, the founders of Google - Larry Page and Sergey Brin - not only earned fortunes, but also shaped reality, changed culture, economic structures and way of life.The beginnings of their stunning careers were not a bed of roses - youthful attempts in basements, garages and dorms only brought luxuries in the form of private jets and yachts years later.Viewers will learn about the breakthrough moments of their professional lives and why they achieved success.The show examines the ups and downs of their companies, as well as the stunning rise of billionaires around the world.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: The story of one of the most effective marketing campaigns in the history of the modern world - the political career of Adolf Hitler.One man was responsible for the powerful propaganda slogans of the leader of the Third Reich, who, feeding on social dissatisfaction after World War I, sold Nazi ideology to the Germans.The creators of the series explore the dictator's speeches in beer halls and demonstrations organized on the streets of Berlin.All this led to a bloody war, dehumanization and the destruction of millions of human lives.

programme.title: Icons of Auto
programme.desc: Stories of famous automotive brands.Their logos are recognizable on every continent, and subsequent car models are desired by collectors.We will get to know five iconic models of each brand.

programme.title: Icons of Auto
programme.desc: Stories of famous automotive brands.Their logos are recognizable on every continent, and subsequent car models are desired by collectors.We will get to know five iconic models of each brand.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: A series devoted to the greatest engineering disasters in the history of mankind.Chernobyl, Titanic and Hinderburg - these are examples of bold technological experiments that ended tragically.

programme.title: Narodziny miliarderów
programme.desc: A small group of fabulously wealthy people dominated society.They are wealthier and more influential than many countries.Their genius, dedication to passions, and even antics influence stock markets, the development of cities, the mechanisms of democracy and our way of thinking.Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg, the founders of Google - Larry Page and Sergey Brin - not only earned fortunes, but also shaped reality, changed culture, economic structures and way of life.The beginnings of their stunning careers were not a bed of roses - youthful attempts in basements, garages and dorms only brought luxuries in the form of private jets and yachts years later.Viewers will learn about the breakthrough moments of their professional lives and why they achieved success.The show examines the ups and downs of their companies, as well as the stunning rise of billionaires around the world.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: The story of one of the most effective marketing campaigns in the history of the modern world - the political career of Adolf Hitler.One man was responsible for the powerful propaganda slogans of the leader of the Third Reich, who, feeding on social dissatisfaction after World War I, sold Nazi ideology to the Germans.The creators of the series explore the dictator's speeches in beer halls and demonstrations organized on the streets of Berlin.All this led to a bloody war, dehumanization and the destruction of millions of human lives.

programme.title: Icons of Auto
programme.desc: Stories of famous automotive brands.Their logos are recognizable on every continent, and subsequent car models are desired by collectors.We will get to know five iconic models of each brand.
